sidebar.continueProfileSetupHint: Finish a few details so bookings and payouts work smoothly.

settings.title: Settings
settings.customerSubtitle: Account & profile, addresses, payment methods, and more.
settings.proSubtitle: Manage your pro account, business, payouts, and preferences.

auth.signInToContinue: Sign in to continue where you left off.
auth.preferNoPassword: Prefer not to use a password? You can sign in with an email code or Google.
auth.continueWithEmailOrGoogle: Continue with email code or Google →
auth.havingTrouble: Having trouble? Use email code or Google sign-in.
auth.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.findLocalHelp: Find local help without the guesswork.
auth.signInToBrowse: Sign in to browse pros, send a request, and message on-platform. You can add details later.
auth.emailCodeExplanation: We'll email you a 6-digit code. No password needed for the email option.
auth.enterCodeWeEmailed: Enter the 6-digit code we emailed you
auth.agreeTerms: By continuing, you agree to keep communication on-platform and follow our Terms.

onboarding.howWillYouUse: How will you use Flyers Up?
onboarding.switchRolesAnytime: Switch roles any time. Pick one — you can switch later.
onboarding.lookingForServicesDesc: Book local pros, message, and manage jobs.
onboarding.offerServicesDesc: Create a simple profile and start taking bookings.
onboarding.addVerificationLater: You can add verification and payouts later.
onboarding.businessNameOptional: Optional. If blank, your first and last name will be shown.
onboarding.selectServices: Select the services you offer (at least one)

account.title: Account Settings
account.changePassword: Change your password. Requires current password.

flyerWall.subtitleCustomer: Real completed work — neighborhood-level locations only
flyerWall.introCustomer: Each card is a real job that finished on Flyers Up. We show ZIP or general area only — never street addresses or customer details.
flyerWall.introPro: Same feed customers see — plus light tags for what’s fresh. No internal analytics here yet.
flyerWall.emptyTitle: The wall is quiet — the marketplace is still warming up
flyerWall.emptyBody: As pros complete verified jobs, before/after proof and ratings will appear here first. That is how you will know real work is happening near you.
flyerWall.emptyTrust: Every entry you will see here is tied to a completed booking and optional customer rating — never comments or payouts.
flyerWall.noFlyersDesc: Pros will appear here as they join. Check back soon!

topPros.title: Most trusted this week
topPros.subtitle: Top pros
topPros.body: These pros earned strong ratings and verified completions recently. Order is for discovery — not a race. We never show earnings or fees.
topPros.emptyBody: When more verified work finishes this week, trusted pros will appear here.
topPros.footnote: Based on the same data as the pro leaderboard, presented for booking confidence — not competition.
topPros.jobsVerified: {count, plural, one {# verified job} other {# verified jobs}}
topPros.activeThisWeek: {count, plural, one {# job this week} other {# jobs this week}}

leaderboard.title: Weekly leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: Rankings use verified completions from the last 7 days, weighted by average rating. You need at least three lifetime verified jobs to qualify. Quality beats volume — pricing is not a factor.
leaderboard.emptyBody: Complete verified jobs and stay active this week to appear here.
leaderboard.footnote: Earnings and customer fees are never shown on this screen.
leaderboard.jobsThisWeek: {count, plural, one {# job this week} other {# jobs this week}}

admin.requiresAdmin: This page requires an admin account.
admin.adminAccessHint: Admin access: add this email to ADMIN_EMAILS...
admin.signInPrompt: Sign in with email code or Google →
admin.marketplaceHealth: Marketplace health, operations, and support tools.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose your preferred language for the app.
